title: avena pubescens subsp. hugeninii
intro: Avena pubescens subsp. hugeninii, also known as Hugel's oatgrass, is a subspecies of oatgrass native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been shown to have potential in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Avena pubescens subsp. hugeninii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hugel's oatgrass are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
